item.title: India's approach to the Russia-Ukraine conflict shows diplomatic maturity
item.description: As the Russia-Ukraine war edges towards a negotiated end, India's strategic autonomy and energy security face a defining test

item.description: Post-Operation Sindoor, India and Pakistan are locked in a technology-driven arms race
